body.raw:
# Switch

## Import

```jsx live=false
import { Switch } from '@totejs/uikit';
```

## Usage

```jsx
<FormControl>
  <FormLabel htmlFor="email-alerts">Enable email alerts?</FormLabel>
  <Switch id="email-alerts" />
</FormControl>
```

## Colors

```jsx
function Example() {
  return (
    <HStack>
      {['primary', 'success', 'warning', 'danger'].map((item) => (
        <Switch colorScheme={item} isChecked key={item} />
      ))}
    </HStack>
  );
}
```

## Status

```jsx
<FormControl>
  <FormLabel htmlFor="unChecked">unChecked:</FormLabel>
  <Switch id="unChecked" isChecked={false} />

  <FormLabel htmlFor="isChecked">isChecked:</FormLabel>
  <Switch id="isChecked" isChecked />

  <FormLabel htmlFor="isDisabled">isDisabled:</FormLabel>
  <Switch id="isDisabled" isDisabled defaultChecked />

  <FormLabel htmlFor="isInvalid">isInvalid:</FormLabel>
  <Switch id="isInvalid" isInvalid />

  <FormLabel htmlFor="isReadOnly">isReadOnly:</FormLabel>
  <Switch id="isReadOnly" isReadOnly />
</FormControl>
```

## Props

<PropsTable
  data={[
    {
      name: 'colorShceme',
      required: false,
      type: '"primary" | "success" | "danger" | "warning"',
      default: '"primary"',
      desc: 'The outline color of switch',
    },
    {
      name: 'isChecked',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: `If true, the checkbox will be checked. You'll need to pass onChange to update its value (since it is now controlled)`,
    },
    {
      name: 'defaultChecked',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: '',
      desc: 'If true, the checkbox will be initially checked.',
    },
    {
      name: 'onChange',
      required: false,
      type: '((event: ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void)',
      desc: 'The callback invoked when the checked state of the Checkbox changes.',
    },
    {
      name: 'onFocus',
      required: false,
      type: '((event: FocusEvent<HTMLInputElement, Element>) => void)',
      desc: 'The callback invoked when the checkbox is focused',
    },
    {
      name: 'isDisabled',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: 'If true, the switch will be disabled.',
    },
    {
      name: 'isInvalid',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: 'If true, the switch will be invalid.',
    },
    {
      name: 'isReadOnly',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: 'If true, the switch will be readonly.',
    },
  ]}
/>
